name: word-docx
tagline: ClawHub (352★): Create, inspect, and edit Microsoft Word documents and DOCX files with reliable styles, numbering, tracked changes, tables,
verdict: Red flag: this skill is pure prose -- no named commands, tools, or scripts anywhere, just conceptual instructions like 'inspect the package layout.' An agent following it has nothing concrete to execute and may improvise wrongly. Its name field also breaks kebab-case, and no scope boundary is stated.

highlights.summary: The entire skill is conceptual guidance with no named commands, tools, or scripts anywhere — 'inspect the package layout', 'use OOXML-aware editing', 'extend the current style syst
Despite a section titled 'before delivery' and three declared job modes (create/inspect/edit), no file path, report shape, or required-fields format is ever specified for what the
The skill catalogs many ways edits can silently fail (renumbering, orphaned comments, stale fields, layout drift) but never once states a detection step, fallback, or stop-and-repo
